en: Let's face it.
It's the language of the internet.
It's the language of finance.
It's the language of air traffic control,
of public transportation, of the human race.
It's the language of the future.
It's the language of the future.
And it's the language of the past.
It's the language of the future.
It's the language of air traffic control,
of popular music, diplomacy.
English is everywhere.
Now, Mandarin Chinese is spoken by more people,
ko: 지금 만다린 중국어를 사용하는 사람이 더 많지만,

en: but more Chinese people are learning English
ko: 더 많은 중국인이 영어를 배우고 있다.

en: than English speakers are learning Chinese.
ko: 영어를 배우는 사람보다 영어를 사용하는 사람이 더 많다.

en: Last I heard,
there are two dozen universities in China right now
teaching all in English.
English is taking over.
And in addition to that,
it's been predicted that at the end of the century,
almost all of the languages that exist now, there are about 6,000,
ko: 현재 존재하는 약 6,000개의 언어 중 거의 모든 언어가 사라질 것이라고 예측되고 있다.

en: will no longer be spoken.
ko: 남는 언어는 몇 백 개뿐일 것이다.

en: There will only be some hundreds.
